Steven Gerrard: "I don't know how Jeremy Mathieu is wearing a Barcelona shirt."
Steven Gerrard: "I don't know how Jeremy Mathieu is wearing a Barcelona shirt."

Luis Enrique: “It doesn’t matter whether it was a fair result or not – that was the result. It was like living the nightmare all over again – a nightmare that all Barça fans went through already not so long ago ... We were impotent in the first half, not good enough in the second.”
“We have to work out in detail where it all went wrong. Our positioning wasn’t up to the required level. We were lacking intensity and you can’t afford to do that against Juventus in the Champions League.”
“But in the second half we were as good as, if not better than, Juve. We got the ball moving better, created clear chances, but we didn’t have that little bit of luck that you always need.”
“But it’s the first half that I can’t get out of my head. It’s such a shame because I know how much the players wanted to get out there and compete.”
“I won’t compare Juventus to the team we beat in the 2015 final, but what I will say is that today we saw a very nice team. They played top quality, intense football. Bringing the ball out from the back, creating pressure up front – and Dani Alves was doing what he has always done and I congratulate him.”
“Tomorrow we will all meet up again and think about what we have to do. I’m 100% accepting responsibility for what happened tonight. Now it’s time to think about planning for another comeback.”
“If we play as well as we can, we can score four goals against anyone,”

丹狗係dybala 入波無慶祝埋一份行開左

特警b

在足球比賽裡，一般情況下，在比賽結束後，客隊球員都應該向遠道而來支持他們的球迷致謝，無論輸贏，這都是一個禮節式的傳統。但是在今天凌晨客場不敵尤文圖斯後，巴薩將士卻心態失衡，並沒有到客隊看台下致謝，這引起了巴薩球迷的不滿。

西班牙塞爾電台的記者採訪了一些巴薩球迷，他們對於球員的行為不滿意，因為絕大多數球迷都是從西班牙趕來都靈為球隊加油，一路奔波勞累，最終卻得到這樣的對待，這讓球迷有些不高興。

讓人意外的是，比賽結束後，唯一來到巴薩球迷看台致謝的居然是尤文球員阿爾維斯，當時這名前巴薩右路魔翼安慰了失落的球迷們。其實在比賽裡，當尤文進球後，阿爾維斯也表現得非常冷靜，沒有進行慶祝，這也是他對老東家尊重的一種表達。對壘老東家巴薩，阿爾維斯全場表現高光，完成了4次鏟斷，成功率達到了100%，高空球爭搶成功率也有100%，他的傳球成功率是93%，創造了1次射門機會，同時還有1次射門。本賽季歐冠聯賽僅餘的8支球隊裡，阿爾維斯21次創造進球機會位居所有球員第一。看起來，阿爾維斯依然在高水平，不知道看到舊將的發揮後，巴薩高層是否會後悔。
